title: Rubio Says Details on Iran Nuclear Program Still to Be Negotiated
summary_full: The Secretary of State said the United States was prepared to begin those talks if Iran opens the Strait of Hormuz as part of an apparently emerging deal on the war.
summary_public: The Secretary of State said the United States was prepared to begin those talks if Iran opens the Strait of Hormuz as part of an apparently emerging deal on the war.

IR.label: neutral
